info.name: Zoom user/
info.description:
Needs description.

Contact Support:
 Name: Zoom Developers
 Email: developer@zoom.us

request.description: Delete a user's assistant.
Set a user's assistant which can schedule meeting for him.

urlencoded.description: (Required) A valid email address. It must be unique in Zoom service. If an email address is existed, a "user existing" error message will be return
(Required) User’s type. 1 for basic user, 2 for pro user, 3 for corp user. Basic user can host up to 40 minutes meeting
Enable automatic recording. By default, if "enable_cloud_auto_recording" is true, it will become true
User’s meeting capacity, 0 means following account’s meeting capacity
Enable webinar capacity, can be 100, 500, 1000, 3000, 5000 or 10000, depends on if having related webinar capacity plan subscription or not
Enable large meeting capacity, can be 100, 200, 300 or 500, depends on if having related webinar capacity plan subscription or not
Enter/exit chime type. 0 means Heard by all including host and attendees, 1 means Heard by host only
Disable email notification when a meeting is cancelled
Enable Generate and require password for participants joining by phone
Auto delete cloud recordings after days
Department for user profile, use for repor
User Group ID. If set default user group, the parameter’s default value is the default user group
IM Group ID. If set default im group, the parameter’s default value is the default im group

request.description:
Create a user on Zoom, returns the created user ID.

<aside class="notice">
The API is provided for enterprise customer who has a managed domain
</aside>

<aside class="warning">
This feature is disabled by default because of the security risk involved in creating a user who does not belong to your domain without notifying the user. You need to contact Zoom customer support if you want to use this API
</aside>

response.name: Success

urlencoded.description: (Required) A valid email address. It must be unique in Zoom service. If an email address is existed, a "user existing" error message will be return
(Required) User’s type. 1 for basic user, 2 for pro user, 3 for corp user. Basic user can host up to 40 minutes meeting
Enable automatic recording. By default, if "enable_cloud_auto_recording" is true, it will become true
User’s meeting capacity, 0 means following account’s meeting capacity
Enable webinar capacity, can be 100, 500, 1000, 3000, 5000 or 10000, depends on if having related webinar capacity plan subscription or not

Enter/exit chime type. 0 means Heard by all including host and attendees, 1 means Heard by host only
Disable email notification when a meeting is cancelled
Enable Generate and require password for participants joining by phone

request.description: Check if the user email exists.
Check if the zpk is expired. The zpk is used to authenticate a user.

urlencoded.description: (Required) A valid email address. It must be unique in Zoom service. If an email address is existed, a "user existing" error message will be return
(Required) User’s type. 1 for basic user, 2 for pro user, 3 for corp user. Basic user can host up to 40 minutes meeting
Enable automatic recording. By default, if "enable_cloud_auto_recording" is true, it will become true
User’s meeting capacity, passing 0 will inherit account’s meeting capacity
Enable webinar capacity, can be 100, 500, 1000, 3000, 5000 or 10000, depends on if having related webinar capacity plan subscription or not
Enable large meeting capacity, can be 100, 200, 300 or 500, depends on if having related webinar capacity plan subscription or not
Enter/exit chime type. 0 means Heard by all including host and attendees, 1 means Heard by host only
Disable email notification when a meeting is cancelled
Enable Generate and require password for participants joining by phone
Auto delete cloud recordings after days
Department for user profile, use for repor
User Group ID. If set default user group, the parameter’s default value is the default user group
IM Group ID. If set default im group, the parameter’s default value is the default im group

request.description:
Create a user on Zoom, returns the created user ID.

<aside class="notice">
Your account must have this privilege to provisioning user. Zoom only assigns this privilege to a trusted partner
</aside>

<aside class="notice">
User will get an email sent from Zoom. There is a confirmation link in this email. User will then need to click this link to activate their account to the Zoom service. The user can set or change their password in Zoom.
</aside>

response.name: Success

request.description:
Create a user on Zoom, returns the created user ID.

<aside class="notice">
The API is provided for API plan only
</aside>

<aside class="notice">
User created in this way has no password and is not able to log into the Zoom web site or client
</aside>

response.name: Success

urlencoded.description: The user’s email address. Must have id or email, if given id, the email is ignored.

request.description: Delete a user from Zoom system permanently.

urlencoded.description: The user’s email address. Must have id or email, if given id, the email is ignored.

request.description: Revoke a user's SSO token.
List assigned schedule privilege for host users.

urlencoded.description: (Required) A valid email address. It must be unique in Zoom service.
(Required) User’s type. 1 means it is a basic user. 2 means a pro user, 3 means a corp user. Basic user can host up to 40 minutes meeting.
User’s meeting capacity, 0 means following account’s meeting capacity.
Enable webinar feature true or false.
Enable webinar capacity, can be 100, 500, 1000, 3000, 5000 or 10000, depends on if having related webinar capacity plan subscription or not.
Enable large meting feature true or false.
Enable large meeting capacity, can be 100, 200, 300 or 500, depends on if having related webinar capacity plan subscription or not.
Personal Meeting ID, long, length must be 10.
User Group ID. If set default user group, the parameter’s default value is the default user group.
IM Group ID. If set default im group, the parameter’s default value is the default im group.

request.description:
Create a SSO user on Zoom, return the created user ID.

<aside class="notice">The API is provided for enabled 'Pre-provisioning SSO User' option. User created in this way has no password. If it is not a basic user, will generate a Personal Vanity URL using user name (no domain) of the provisioning email. If user name or pmi is invalid or occupied, will use random number/random personal vanity URL.</aside>

response.name: Success

urlencoded.description: (Required) A valid email address. It must be unique in Zoom service.
(Required) User’s type. 1 means it is a basic user. 2 means a pro user, 3 means a corp user. Basic user can host up to 40 minutes meeting.
User’s meeting capacity, 0 means following account’s meeting capacity.
Enable webinar feature true or false.
Enable webinar capacity, can be 100, 500, 1000, 3000, 5000 or 10000, depends on if having related webinar capacity plan subscription or not.
Enable large meting feature true or false.
Enable large meeting capacity, can be 100, 200, 300 or 500, depends on if having related webinar capacity plan subscription or not.
Personal Meeting ID, long, length must be 10.
User Group ID. If set default user group, the parameter’s default value is the default user group.
IM Group ID. If set default im group, the parameter’s default value is the default im group.

urlencoded.description: User’s type. 1 means it is a basic user. 2 means a pro user, 3 means a corp user. Basic user can host up to 40 minutes meeting.
Enable record the active speaker view.
Enable record an audio only file.
Enable automatic recording. By default, if "enable_cloud_auto_recording" is true, it will become true.
User’s meeting capacity, passing 0 will inherit account’s meeting capacity
Enable webinar feature true or false.
Enable webinar capacity, can be 100, 500, 1000, 3000, 5000 or 10000, depends on if having related webinar capacity plan subscription or not.
Enable large meting feature true or false.
Enable large meeting capacity, can be 100, 200, 300 or 500, depends on if having related webinar capacity plan subscription or not.
Enter/exit chime type. 0 means Heard by all including host and attendees, 1 means Heard by host only.
Disable email notification when a meeting is cancelled.
Enable Use Personal Meeting ID for instant meetings.
Enable Generate and require password for participants joining by phone.
Auto delete cloud recordings after days.
Personal Meeting ID, long, length must be 10.
Department for user profile, use for report.
The time zone id for user profile.
User Group ID. If set default user group, the parameter’s default value is the default user group.
IM Group ID. If set default im group, the parameter’s default value is the default im group.

request.description: Update user info on Zoom via user ID.

urlencoded.description: User’s type. 1 means it is a basic user. 2 means a pro user, 3 means a corp user. Basic user can host up to 40 minutes meeting.
Enable record the active speaker view.
Enable record an audio only file.
Enable automatic recording. By default, if "enable_cloud_auto_recording" is true, it will become true.
User’s meeting capacity, passing 0 will inherit account’s meeting capacity
Enable webinar feature true or false.
Enable webinar capacity, can be 100, 500, 1000, 3000, 5000 or 10000, depends on if having related webinar capacity plan subscription or not.
Enable large meting feature true or false.
Enable large meeting capacity, can be 100, 200, 300 or 500, depends on if having related webinar capacity plan subscription or not.
Enter/exit chime type. 0 means Heard by all including host and attendees, 1 means Heard by host only.
Disable email notification when a meeting is cancelled.
Enable Use Personal Meeting ID for instant meetings.
Enable Generate and require password for participants joining by phone.
Auto delete cloud recordings after days.
Personal Meeting ID, long, length must be 10.
Department for user profile, use for report.
The time zone id for user profile.
User Group ID. If set default user group, the parameter’s default value is the default user group.
IM Group ID. If set default im group, the parameter’s default value is the default im group.
(Required) User picture file, must be a jpg/jpeg file.

request.description: Upload and update user's profile picture on Zoom via user ID.
